description: ADDITIONAL young/early-career photos of celebrities hosted on Wikimedia Commons. All URLs resolved via the Commons MediaWiki imageinfo API and HEAD-checked to return 200 with image/* content-type. Every file is public domain or CC-licensed. Backfill to supplement audit/young-celeb-urls.json.
